message:
chore(deps): bump libfuzzer-sys 0.4.10 → 0.4.12 in fuzz workspace

The fuzz workspace is separate from the main workspace (own
`[workspace]` block in fuzz/Cargo.toml). libfuzzer-sys moves from
0.4.10 minimum to 0.4.12 which is a patch-level bump with no API
changes affecting our fuzz targets (they use the standard
`fuzz_target!` macro and bytes-in interface).

Cargo.lock for fuzz also incorporated an updated fp-conformance dep
footprint (chrono + unicode-casefold from the recent conformance
additions) picked up via `cargo update`.

No build verification ran here — the fuzz crate requires nightly
rustc + cargo-fuzz sub-command and is not part of the main
`cargo check --workspace` surface. The dependency delta is purely
patch-level so risk is negligible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -543,6 +543,7 @@ dependencies = [
 name = "fp-conformance"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
+ "chrono",
  "fp-columnar",
  "fp-expr",
  "fp-frame",
@@ -587,6 +588,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
  "thiserror",
+ "unicode-casefold",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -1397,6 +1399,12 @@ version = "1.19.0"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "562d481066bde0658276a35467c4af00bdc6ee726305698a55b86e61d7ad82bb"
 
+[[package]]
+name = "unicode-casefold"
+version = "0.2.0"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "b7f66b1c8f8caa2ab31dc6d3f35386f16efdab89668f93411e565ac368908e8f"
+
 [[package]]
 name = "unicode-ident"
 version = "1.0.24"
